description: After being redirected to the home page from a protected route (e.g. Passengers), the user logs in via the modal but is not taken to the page they originally wanted; they remain on the home page instead of being redirected to the protected route.
expectedOutcome: After logging in from the login modal (when that modal was shown after trying to access a protected route), the user should be redirected to the originally requested protected route (e.g. /passengers).
hint: A callback passed to the login modal is memoized with an empty dependency array, so it closes over stale values.
symptom: Post-login redirect to the intended protected page does not occur; user stays on home.
solution: Include redirectTo and navigate in the useCallback dependency array so the callback always uses the current redirect target.
